{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"202603220316129D751181888472AD8EA4"}"},"total":647},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7594130753366459198","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"好看好看，双方对彼此的偏执占有与身份悬殊带来的刺激感让人欲罢不能啊，女主爱得小心翼翼又炽热忠诚，也不失为一种姐狗文学？我还挺吃这一套的哈哈[飞吻]"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1768148127,"group_id":"7556056361914616857","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"目前随缘更，看心情更新","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N9l+02jwbekYvcZfj0BfjYk=","gender":2,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-static/1437c63bc45b464bb1cc6cd6a7b0d4f1~tplv-1yzifmftcy-expand:200:0:0.png","user_id":"688744194119815","user_name":"金XV"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"688744194119815","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7556056361914616857","book_info":{"abstract":"【不对等关系+重度依赖症+病态迷恋+建议慎入】
姜雾夏胎穿成恶毒炮灰兼保姆养女，大小姐的忠犬小跟班，被大小姐圈养在身边。
二十四小时贴身使唤，任劳任怨，随叫随到。
系统却要她背叛身为反派的豪门大小姐司停雪，将大小姐黑化值刷到100%！
让司停雪成为她的奴仆，双眼被废，死无葬身之地。
仰望着司停雪背影，姜雾夏对司停雪早就感情变了质。
让主角杀掉姐姐？她让姐姐死掉？
没有可能！姐姐只能是她的！
这群蝼蚁怎么敢越界！
她永远会是姐姐最忠诚的从属，姐姐让她做任何事她都会做，她要永远匍匐在姐姐身边。
—
司停雪觉醒了。
她看到她从小养在身边的姜雾夏最后会弑主，背叛她、凌辱她，和别人远走高飞。
荒谬，她不允许她的“宠物”做出以下犯上的荒唐事。
如果她的忠犬不听话，那得加倍惩罚才行。
不是吗？
—
双方性格均有瑕疵，非典型好人。
世界观原创，切勿带入现实。","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/4bf2f232628cd8afe7ac144b084f0a40","author":"月亮藏雾","author_id":"","book_id":"7556056361914616857","book_name":"说好让我做狗呢，怎么抱着我亲","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#282028","creation_status":"0","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"2.4万人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":704,"name":"双女主","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=704&name=双女主&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":37,"name":"穿越","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=37&name=穿越&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":473,"name":"豪门世家","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=473&name=豪门世家&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":519,"name":"大小姐","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=519&name=大小姐&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":757,"name":"现代","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=757&name=现代&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":1012,"name":"纯爱","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1012&name=纯爱&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7556056390461030937","read_count":"23614","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"395602"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"9.1","serial_count":"184","tags":"双女主,穿越,豪门世家,大小姐,现代,纯爱","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/a3228b738449c95f308c77be23c9c577~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779304572&x-signature=xbxLxnTUpDCpti47IV5%2F87ro2rY%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"3602413478477879","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"97"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"202603220316129D751181888472AD8EA4"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读7小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":5,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":0,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":23898,"reply_count":0,"show_pv":675},"user_action":{"author":0,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"data_type":4},{"comment":{"comment_id":"7592639975257522969","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"非常豪堪😋😋，只有十几万字的时候就刷到这本，看完简介之后一直想看 但是看着连载这俩大字又忍住了，一直憋到完结才看，也是不枉费我每天都来看一眼完没完结。两个主角性格很鲜明，司停雪完全主人 雾夏完全忠诚小狗(･ω･) 前期拉扯暧昧还带点病态，后期在一起之后也是黏黏糊糊的，两个人都长嘴有事就说开很完美。系统算是我看过的存在感最低的之一了。总之就是带感豪堪[笑]本人对这种设定的文毫无抵抗力，但是这设定要好也写不容易，月亮写的算是比较好看的那一批了( ¨̮ 傲娇年上的姐姐也特别带感，明知身边有“背叛”隐患却还是默许靠近，这种双向的拉扯和羁绊，让两个人的关系充满了宿命感。作者笔下的依赖根本不是软弱的依附，而是带着狠劲的共生，又甜又虐，完全踩在我的XP上疯狂蹦迪！[雀食神作][雀食神作][雀食神作][雀食神作][雀食神作]"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1770616508,"group_id":"7556056361914616857","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"单机日更30000字，不会作诗也会吟","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2NzP8/B7wSR+9uY+NBgYKqYbLqzjThy8C4FztmjX1hrF8","gender":0,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":2,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/25d4dc35610e4e40a99c39d3919ed45d~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776709191&x-signature=7Z0iNg0HFRSe27LZJsxO%2FdxnnY4%3D","user_id":"1141718017651844","user_name":"小鞠女推大爆"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"1141718017651844","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7556056361914616857","book_info":{"abstract":"【不对等关系+重度依赖症+病态迷恋+建议慎入】
